common.createAccountBenefits: Save your details for faster checkout next time

header.promoAccount: Създайте акаунт, за да проследявате и достъпвате вашите поръчки по всяко време
header.promoB2B: Отворете B2B акаунт за обемни цени и по-добри отстъпки
header.tigoProductSupportDesc: Техническа помощ за продукти Tigo Energy

footer.companyDesc: Вашият партньор за професионални решения за оптимизация на слънчева енергия в Европа.
footer.operatedBy: Управлява се от: Initra Energija d.o.o. - Оторизиран дистрибутор на Tigo Energy
footer.disclaimer1: Доставката зависи от трети страни и ние нямаме контрол над времето за доставка или забавяния.
footer.disclaimer2: Гаранцията на производителя се прилага за MLPE устройства.
footer.disclaimer3: Безпроблемните връщания се прилагат за B2C клиенти за лична употреба в рамките на 14 дни. Купувачът носи отговорност за разходите за обратна доставка.

products.noProductsCategory: Все още няма налични продукти в тази категория.
products.noProductsSearch: Няма продукти, съответстващи на "{search}". Опитайте друг термин за търсене.

cart.cartEmptyDesc: Изглежда, че все още не сте добавили нищо.
cart.saveCartDesc: Дайте име на количката си (напр. номер на поръчка, име на проект), за да я възстановите лесно по-късно.
cart.b2bPricingDesc: Показаните цени са без ДДС. ДДС ще бъде изчислен при плащане въз основа на местоположението на вашия бизнес и ДДС номер.
cart.priceIncludesVatDesc: Всички показани цени включват {rate}% ДДС. Разходите за доставка ще бъдат добавени при плащане.

checkout.warrantyReturnInfo: Разбирам, че се прилага 1-годишна гаранция и 14-дневна политика за връщане.
checkout.customsDisclaimerTitle: Уведомление за мита и вносни такси
checkout.customsDisclaimerBody: Тази поръчка се изпраща извън Европейския съюз. Митата, вносните данъци и други такси НЕ са включени в общата сума и са изцяло отговорност на купувача.
checkout.newsletterSubscribe: Абонирайте се за нашия бюлетин за новини за слънчева енергия и ексклузивни оферти.
checkout.b2bNote: B2B поръчка: Показани са нето цени. Може да се приложи обратно начисляване на ДДС.
checkout.requiredFieldsDesc: Полетата, маркирани с червена рамка, са задължителни.
checkout.noShippingMethods: Няма налични методи за доставка за вашия избор.
checkout.truckAccess: My delivery location has standard commercial truck access
checkout.truckAccessDesc: Check this if a 12-ton truck can easily access and unload at your site.
checkout.truckAccessPlaceholder: e.g. Ramp available, Forklift on site, Open 8:00 - 16:00...
checkout.paymentInfoDesc: Direct Wise-to-Wise transfers have a €0 fee. Please note that a 3% processing fee applies to all other payments, including Apple Pay and Credit/Debit cards.
checkout.euB2bNote: EU B2B Reverse Charge: 0% VAT applied (Intra-Community Sale).
checkout.b2bFinalSale: B2B Policy: All sales are final. 14-day return period is not applicable for business customers.
checkout.b2bTermsNote: As a business customer, you acknowledge that all sales are final and common consumer return rights do not apply.
checkout.addressNoteLookup: Please verify your address with Google by clicking in the address field and then on a Google suggested address.
checkout.addressNoteManual: Automatic address lookup is currently unavailable. Please enter your address details manually.
checkout.poNumberPlaceholder: напр. PO-2024-001 или ime na proekt

home.heroTitle: Специализиран онлайн магазин за продукти Tigo Energy
home.heroSubtitle: Без надценки. Без изненади. Само директен достъп.
home.heroServing: Обслужваме цялата слънчева общност: Инсталатори, Търговци и Домакинства.
home.noProductsYet: Все още няма налични продукти. Добавете продукти в администраторския панел.
home.shopByCategorySubtitle: Намерете правилните продукти за вашия слънчев проект
home.logisticsP1: От нашия стратегически център в Словения свързваме производственото съвършенство на Тайланд и Китай директно до вашата врата. Стоките пристигат през пристанище Копер—най-краткият маршрут от Азия до Централна Европа.
home.logisticsP2: Това логистично предимство минимизира времето за транзит и елиминира ненужни посредници. Резултатът? Можем да дистрибутираме продукти Tigo Energy навсякъде в EU на възможно най-ниската цена.
home.mapAlt: Карта на EU дистрибуция на Tigo Energy - словенски център
home.whyChooseSubtitle: Правим оптимизацията на слънчевата енергия проста и достъпна
home.moreEnergyDesc: Оптимизацията на ниво модул гарантира максимално извличане на мощност от всеки панел, дори при частична сянка.
home.enhancedSafetyDesc: Съответствие с бързо изключване и мониторинг на ниво модул за спокойствие.
home.smartMonitoringDesc: Данни за производителност в реално време за всеки модул с платформата Tigo Energy Intelligence.
home.ctaTitle: Готови ли сте да оптимизирате вашата слънчева инсталация?
home.ctaSubtitle: Присъединете се към хиляди инсталатори и домакинства, които се доверяват на Tigo за своите нужди от оптимизация на слънчева енергия.

invoice.returnPolicy: Политика за връщане: Предлагаме 14-дневна политика за връщане на всички неизползвани артикули в оригиналната им опаковка. Моля, свържете се с support@tigoenergy.com за разрешения за връщане.
invoice.warranty: Гаранция: Всички продукти, изброени в тази фактура, са покрити от 1-годишна стандартна ограничена гаранция, започваща от датата на доставка.
invoice.legalAgreement: Правно споразумение: Клиентът се е съгласил електронно с Общите условия на: {date}.
invoice.thankYou: Благодарим ви, че избрахте Tigo Energy. Устойчивостта е нашата мисия.

verificationCode.title: Потвърдете вашия имейл адрес
verificationCode.text: Благодарим ви, че се присъединихте към Tigo Energy SHOP. За да завършите регистрацията си и да защитите акаунта си, моля, използвайте следния код за потвърждение:
verificationCode.expire: Този код ще изтече след 10 минути. Ако не сте го поискали, моля, игнорирайте този имейл.

verificationLink.title: Потвърдете вашия имейл адрес
verificationLink.text: Добре дошли в Tigo Energy SHOP! Моля, кликнете върху бутона по-долу, за да потвърдите имейл адреса си и да активирате акаунта си.
verificationLink.linkHelp: Ако бутонът по-горе не работи, можете също да копирате и поставите следната връзка във вашия браузър:
verificationLink.ignore: Ако не сте създали акаунт, не е необходимо по-нататъшно действие.

welcome.title: Добре дошли в семейството!
welcome.text: Радваме се, че се присъединихте към нас в Tigo Energy SHOP. Вече сте свързани със специализирания дистрибутор на Tigo Energy соларни решения в Европа.
welcome.feature1Desc: Директен достъп до технически експерти, които познават продуктите на Tigo до съвършенство.
welcome.feature2Desc: Оригинални продукти на най-добрите възможни цени, доставяни директно в цяла Европа.
welcome.feature3Desc: Управлявайте вашите поръчки, проследяване и B2B предимства от един профил.
welcome.footerNote: Ако имате въпроси, нашият екип по поддръжка е само на едно съобщение разстояние.

messageSent.title: Получихме вашето запитване
messageSent.text: Благодарим ви, че се свързахте с нас. Вашето съобщение беше успешно доставено на нашия екип по поддръжка. Включихме копие от вашето съобщение по-долу за ваша информация.
messageSent.footerNote: Член на нашия екип ще прегледа вашето запитване и ще се свърже с вас възможно най-скоро. Обикновено отговаряме в рамките на един работен ден.

newMessage.title: Имате ново съобщение
newMessage.text: Член на екипа отговори на вашето запитване. Можете да прегледате съобщението и да продължите разговора във вашия профил в магазина.
newMessage.footerNote: Ако имате проблеми с влизането, моля, свържете се с нашия екип по поддръжка.

orderConfirmation.title: Благодарим ви за поръчката!
orderConfirmation.text: Получихме вашата поръчка и я подготвяме. Ще получите друг имейл, когато поръчката ви бъде изпратена.
orderConfirmation.footerNote: Можете да проследите състоянието на поръчката си във вашия профил.

orderPartial.title: Поръчката е получена
orderPartial.bannerText: Вашата поръчка е получена успешно и е частично платена. Поради естеството или размера на вашата поръчка, в момента изчисляваме най-точната цена за доставка за вашето местоположение.
orderPartial.text: Ще ви уведомим по имейл веднага щом цената за доставка бъде определена. След като бъде потвърдена, ще можете да извършите окончателното плащане във вашия профил, за да завършите поръчката.
orderPartial.footerNote: Благодарим ви за търпението и за това, че избрахте Tigo Energy SHOP.

cartAbandonment.title: Забравихте ли нещо?
cartAbandonment.text: Забелязахме, че сте оставили някои артикули в количката си. Запазихме ги за вас, за да можете да продължите точно оттам, където сте спрели.
cartAbandonment.footerNote: Нуждаете се от помощ с вашата поръчка? Просто отговорете на този имейл и нашият екип ще се радва да ви съдейства.

priceChange.title: Вълнуваща актуализация на цените!
priceChange.text: Помислихме си, че бихте искали да знаете, че продукт, който преди сте купували или към който сте проявявали интерес, вече има нова цена.
priceChange.footerNote: Сега е чудесен момент да разширите соларната си инсталация или да се запасите с компоненти.

delivered.title: Доставено!
delivered.text: Страхотни новини! Вашата поръчка #{{order_number}} беше успешно доставена. Надяваме се, че сте доволни от новите си продукти на Tigo Energy.
delivered.attachmentNote: Можете да изтеглите следните документи от страницата на вашата поръчка:
delivered.doc1: Преглед на поръчката и детайли за доставката
delivered.footerNote: Благодарим ви, че избрахте Initra Energija за ваш партньор на Tigo Energy. Ако имате въпроси относно инсталирането или настройката на продукта, нашият технически екип е тук, за да помогне.

b2bVerified.title: Вашият B2B акаунт е активен
b2bVerified.text: Радваме се да ви информираме, че вашият ДДС номер (VIES) е успешно потвърден. Вашият B2B акаунт вече е напълно активен и можете да се възползвате от всички предимства на нашата програма за професионални партньори.
b2bVerified.footerNote: Добре дошли на борда! Очакваме с нетърпение да подкрепим вашите соларни проекти.

b2bApplication.title: B2B акаунт създаден
b2bApplication.thankYou: Благодарим ви, че регистрирахте B2B акаунт в Tigo Energy SHOP. Радваме се, че сте с нас!
b2bApplication.bannerText: Вашият B2B акаунт вече е активен. Можете веднага да започнете пазаруване и да се възползвате от B2B цени и професионални инструменти.
b2bApplication.text: Просто влезте в акаунта си, за да разгледате пълната ни гама от продукти, да получите достъп до B2B цените си и да направите поръчки.
b2bApplication.footerNote: Ако имате въпроси, не се колебайте да отговорите на този имейл.

passwordReset.title: Нулиране на паролата
passwordReset.text: Получихме заявка за нулиране на паролата за вашия акаунт в Tigo Energy SHOP. Моля, кликнете върху бутона по-долу, за да изберете нова парола.
passwordReset.linkHelp: Ако бутонът по-горе не работи, можете също да копирате и поставите следната връзка във вашия браузър:
passwordReset.expire: Тази връзка ще изтече след 1 час. Ако не сте поискали нулиране на паролата, моля, игнорирайте този имейл.

shippingUpdate.title: Вашата поръчка пътува!
shippingUpdate.text: Вашата поръчка #{{order_number}} е изпратена и вече пътува към вас.
shippingUpdate.footerNote: Моля, имайте предвид, че може да отнеме до 24 часа за актуализиране на информацията за проследяване на уебсайта на превозвача.

returns.title: Returns, Refunds & Warranty Policy
returns.intro: This policy outlines the conditions under which products purchased from Initra Energija d.o.o. through tigoenergy.shop and all regional tigoenergy.* domains may be returned, exchanged, or submitted for warranty claims. By placing an order, you agree to the terms set out below.
returns.p14DayReturns: In accordance with EU Directive 2011/83/EU on consumer rights and the Slovenian Consumer Protection Act (ZVPot-1), B2C customers (consumers) have the right to withdraw from the purchase contract within 14 calendar days from the date on which the customer or a third party designated by the customer (other than the carrier) acquires physical possession of the goods. No reason is required. To exercise this right, you must notify us of your decision to withdraw before the 14-day period expires by submitting a return request through your order history on our website or by sending a clear written statement to support@tigoenergy.shop. The withdrawal period is calculated from the day after delivery. For orders with multiple items delivered separately, the period runs from the day after delivery of the last item.
returns.pConditions: To be eligible for a return, products must meet ALL of the following conditions: (a) The product must be unused, uninstalled, and in the same condition as when you received it. (b) The product must be in its original, unopened packaging with all seals, labels, and protective coverings intact. (c) All accessories, manuals, documentation, and free gifts included with the product must be returned. (d) The product must not show signs of installation, mounting, electrical connection, or physical use. (e) The return must be initiated within the 14-day withdrawal period. Products that have been opened, installed, tested on a live electrical system, physically damaged by the customer, or returned without original packaging will not be accepted for a full refund. In such cases, we reserve the right to refuse the return entirely or to apply a deduction reflecting the diminished value of the goods.
returns.pProcess: To initiate a return: (1) Log in to your account and navigate to your order history. Select the order and click "Request Return". Select the items you wish to return, provide a reason, and submit. (2) You will receive a return authorization with an RMA (Return Merchandise Authorization) number and return shipping instructions. (3) Pack the items securely in the original packaging and include the RMA number visibly on the outside of the package. (4) Ship the return to the address provided in the return authorization. You bear the direct cost of return shipping. (5) Once we receive and inspect the returned items, we will notify you of the outcome and process any applicable refund. Do NOT return items without first obtaining an RMA number. Unauthorized returns (without RMA) will be refused and returned to sender at the sender's expense.
returns.pRestockingFee: A minimum restocking fee of 25% of the product value applies to all accepted returns received within 7 calendar days of the return authorization date. Returns received after 7 days but still within the 14-day withdrawal period are subject to a restocking fee of up to 50% of the product value. These fees reflect the costs of inspection, repackaging, and restocking, and are deducted from the refund amount. Restocking fees do not apply to products that are defective or materially different from their description upon delivery.
returns.pRefunds: Approved refunds will be processed within 14 days of our receipt and successful inspection of the returned goods. Refunds will be issued using the same payment method used for the original purchase. The refund amount will include the product price minus any applicable restocking fee, and minus the original delivery cost if the return is not due to our error. We may withhold the refund until the goods have been received back and inspected, or until you provide proof of return shipment, whichever is earlier. For bank transfers, please allow additional processing time by your bank (typically 3–5 business days after we initiate the refund).
returns.pB2BReturns: All sales to business (B2B) customers are final. B2B customers expressly waive the statutory right of withdrawal applicable to consumers. Returns from B2B customers are accepted solely at the discretion of Initra Energija d.o.o. and require prior written authorization. B2B return requests may be submitted through the same return request form available in your order history. If you do not receive a response from us within 48 hours of submitting your request, your return request is deemed rejected. Where a B2B return is exceptionally authorized, a minimum restocking fee of 25% applies, the Buyer bears all return shipping costs, and the product must be returned in unused, original-packaging condition. B2B refunds, if approved, will be processed within 30 days of receipt and inspection.
returns.pDamaged: If you receive goods that are damaged in transit or materially defective: (a) You must report the damage or defect within 24 hours of delivery by emailing support@tigoenergy.shop with photographs of the damage, the packaging, and the shipping label. (b) For parcels delivered by a tracked carrier (e.g., DPD), you must note external damage on the carrier's proof-of-delivery or electronic device at the time of receipt. (c) Do not discard the damaged packaging — we or the carrier may need to inspect it. (d) Upon verification, we will arrange a replacement or full refund at no cost to you, including return shipping. Claims for transit damage submitted more than 24 hours after delivery, or without photographic evidence, may be rejected. This 24-hour reporting window applies equally to B2C and B2B customers.
returns.pNonEUReturns: Orders shipped outside the European Union are subject to customs duties, import taxes, and other fees imposed by the destination country. These charges are the sole responsibility of the Buyer and are not included in our prices or shipping costs. We are not responsible for delays caused by customs clearance. For returns of non-EU orders: the Buyer is responsible for all return shipping costs, customs paperwork, and any duties or taxes incurred. Refunds for non-EU returns will be processed minus the original shipping cost and any customs-related costs borne by us.
returns.pWarranty: All Tigo Energy products carry manufacturer warranties provided by Tigo Energy, Inc. Warranty periods vary by product line (up to 25 years for MLPE components) and are subject to Tigo Energy's current warranty terms and conditions, available on the Tigo Energy website. Initra Energija d.o.o. acts as a distributor and does not manufacture the products sold. Accordingly, we do not provide any independent product warranty. All warranty obligations rest with the manufacturer. We will assist you in facilitating warranty claims with Tigo Energy where reasonably possible, but we do not guarantee the outcome of any warranty claim.
returns.pWarrantyClaims: To submit a warranty claim: (1) Contact us at support@tigoenergy.shop with your order number, a description of the issue, the product serial number (if applicable), and photographic evidence of the defect. (2) We will evaluate the claim and, if it falls within the scope of the manufacturer's warranty, coordinate with Tigo Energy on your behalf. (3) The manufacturer may request additional information, diagnostics, or return of the product for inspection. (4) If the warranty claim is approved by the manufacturer, the product will be repaired, replaced, or credited as determined by Tigo Energy's warranty policy. Warranty claims are processed according to the manufacturer's timelines, which may vary. We will keep you informed of progress but cannot guarantee resolution times.
returns.pExclusions: Manufacturer warranties do not cover: (a) damage caused by improper installation, misuse, neglect, accident, or unauthorized modification; (b) damage caused by operation outside the product's specified parameters (voltage, temperature, environmental conditions); (c) damage caused by power surges, lightning, flooding, fire, or other natural events; (d) normal wear and tear, cosmetic damage that does not affect functionality; (e) products with removed or altered serial numbers; (f) damage resulting from use with incompatible equipment or non-approved configurations; (g) labor costs for removal, reinstallation, or any related work. The Seller (Initra Energija d.o.o.) shall not be liable for any indirect, consequential, or incidental damages arising from product defects, including but not limited to lost energy production, project delays, system downtime, or third-party claims. The Seller's maximum liability in connection with any warranty matter shall not exceed the original purchase price of the affected product.

shipping.title: Информация за доставка
shipping.pLead: Доставяме решения на Tigo Energy в целия Европейски съюз през работните дни.
shipping.pDeliveryTimes: Средното време за доставка е 2-4 работни дни в зависимост от вашето местоположение.
shipping.pCarriers: Използваме предимно GLS и DPD за стандартни пратки и специализиран товарен транспорт за по-големи поръчки.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Initra Energija d.o.o. ("we", "us", "the Controller") collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal data when you visit our websites (tigoenergy.shop and all regional tigoenergy.* domains), create an account, place an order, or otherwise interact with our services. We are committed to protecting your privacy in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (Regulation (EU) 2016/679, "GDPR") and the Slovenian Personal Data Protection Act (ZVOP-2).
privacy.pController: The data controller responsible for processing your personal data is: Initra Energija d.o.o., Podsmreka 59A, 1356 Dobrova, Slovenia. VAT ID: SI62518313. Registration No: 9624007000. Email: support@tigoenergy.shop. You may contact us at any time regarding your personal data using the details above.
privacy.pDataCollected: We collect the following categories of personal data: (a) Identity data: first name, last name, company name (for B2B customers). (b) Contact data: email address, phone number, billing address, shipping address. (c) Financial data: bank account details (for refunds), VAT number (for B2B customers). We do not store credit card numbers — all card payments are processed by third-party payment providers. (d) Transaction data: order history, order amounts, payment records, invoices, return requests. (e) Account data: email address, hashed password, account preferences, communication preferences. (f) Technical data: IP address, browser type and version, operating system, device type, time zone setting, pages visited, time spent on pages, referral source. (g) Communication data: records of correspondence with our support team, including support tickets, emails, and any attachments. (h) Marketing data: your preferences for receiving marketing communications and your interaction with them.
privacy.pLegalBasis: We process your personal data on the following legal bases under Article 6 GDPR: (a) Performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b)): processing necessary to fulfil your order, process payments, arrange delivery, handle returns, and provide customer support. (b) Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)): processing necessary to comply with tax, accounting, and regulatory requirements (e.g., invoice retention, VAT reporting under the OSS scheme, anti-fraud obligations). (c) Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)): processing necessary for our legitimate business interests, including improving our services, website analytics, fraud prevention, debt recovery, and protecting our legal rights, provided these interests do not override your fundamental rights and freedoms. (d) Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)): where you have given explicit consent, such as for marketing emails or non-essential cookies. You may withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal.
privacy.pUsage: We use your personal data for the following purposes: processing and fulfilling orders; managing your customer account; processing payments and issuing invoices; arranging shipping and delivery (sharing necessary data with carriers such as DPD); handling returns, refunds, and warranty claims; providing customer support and responding to inquiries; sending transactional emails (order confirmations, shipping updates, invoice delivery); sending marketing communications where you have opted in; conducting website analytics to improve user experience and site performance; preventing fraud and unauthorized access; complying with legal and regulatory obligations (tax reporting, accounting, consumer protection); exercising or defending legal claims.
privacy.pSharing: We share your personal data only where necessary and with appropriate safeguards: (a) Shipping carriers (e.g., DPD, GLS): your name, address, phone number, and email for delivery and tracking purposes. (b) Payment processors: payment data necessary to process your transaction. We do not have access to your full card details. (c) Hosting and infrastructure providers (e.g., Vercel, Supabase): your data is stored on servers operated by these providers, who act as data processors under written data processing agreements. (d) Email service providers: for transactional and marketing emails. (e) Tax and accounting authorities: where required by law (e.g., invoice data for VAT reporting). (f) Professional advisors: lawyers, accountants, and auditors where necessary to protect our legal interests. (g) Law enforcement or regulatory authorities: where required by law or in response to a valid legal request. We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal data to third parties for their marketing purposes.
privacy.pTransfers: Your personal data is primarily processed within the European Economic Area (EEA). Where data is transferred outside the EEA (e.g., to cloud service providers with servers in the United States), we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including: EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission; adequacy decisions by the European Commission (e.g., the EU-US Data Privacy Framework); or your explicit consent where required. You may request information about the specific safeguards applied to transfers of your data by contacting us.
privacy.pRetention: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected: (a) Account data: for as long as your account is active, and for 3 years after account closure. (b) Order and transaction data: for 10 years from the date of the transaction, as required by Slovenian tax and accounting legislation (ZDavP-2). (c) Invoice data: for 10 years as required by law. (d) Communication records (support tickets): for 5 years from the date of the last communication. (e) Marketing consent records: for as long as the consent is active, plus 3 years after withdrawal for compliance documentation. (f) Technical/analytics data: for up to 26 months. (g) Cookie data: see our Cookie Policy for specific retention periods. After the applicable retention period, data is securely deleted or anonymized.
privacy.pRights: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data: (a) Right of access (Art. 15): you may request a copy of the personal data we hold about you. (b) Right to rectification (Art. 16): you may request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data. (c) Right to erasure (Art. 17): you may request deletion of your personal data where there is no compelling reason for continued processing ('right to be forgotten'). This right is subject to legal retention obligations. (d) Right to restriction (Art. 18): you may request that we limit the processing of your data in certain circumstances. (e) Right to data portability (Art. 20): you may request to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format (JSON). You can exercise this right through the GDPR data export feature available in your account settings. (f) Right to object (Art. 21): you may object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing purposes. (g) Right to withdraw consent: where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw it at any time. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at support@tigoenergy.shop. We will respond within 30 days. We may request identity verification before processing your request.
privacy.pAutomated: We do not engage in automated decision-making or profiling that produces legal effects concerning you or similarly significantly affects you, as defined under Article 22 GDPR.
privacy.pChildren: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If we become aware that we have collected personal data from a person under 18 without parental consent, we will take steps to delete that data promptly. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us at support@tigoenergy.shop.
privacy.pCookiesRef: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website. For detailed information about the types of cookies we use, their purposes, and how to manage your cookie preferences, please refer to our separate Cookie Policy available at the "Cookie Policy" link in the footer of our website.
privacy.pSecurity: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include: encryption of data in transit (TLS/SSL); secure hosting infrastructure with access controls; regular security assessments; access limited to authorized personnel on a need-to-know basis; secure password hashing. While we strive to protect your personal data, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.pChanges: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, legal requirements, or operational needs. The updated policy will be published on our website with a revised "last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Material changes will be communicated through a prominent notice on our website or by email where appropriate.
privacy.pDPO: For any questions, requests, or complaints regarding this Privacy Policy or the processing of your personal data, please contact: Initra Energija d.o.o., Podsmreka 59A, 1356 Dobrova, Slovenia. Email: support@tigoenergy.shop. We will make every effort to address your concerns promptly.
privacy.pComplaint: If you believe that the processing of your personal data infringes data protection laws, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. The supervisory authority for Slovenia is: Information Commissioner of the Republic of Slovenia (Informacijski pooblaščenec), Dunajska cesta 22, 1000 Ljubljana, Slovenia, email: gp.ip@ip-rs.si, website: www.ip-rs.si. You may also lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority in the EU member state of your habitual residence, place of work, or the place of the alleged infringement.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Sale
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions of Sale ("Terms") govern all purchases made through any website operated by Initra Energija d.o.o. ("we", "us", "the Seller"), including but not limited to tigoenergy.shop and all regional tigoenergy.* domains. By placing an order, you ("the Buyer", "Customer") confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms in their entirety. If you do not agree, do not place an order.
terms.pDefinitions: "Seller" means Initra Energija d.o.o., Podsmreka 59A, 1356 Dobrova, Slovenia, VAT ID SI62518313, registration number 9624007000. "Buyer" or "Customer" means the natural person (consumer/B2C) or legal entity (business/B2B) placing an order. "Products" means all goods offered for sale on our websites, including but not limited to Tigo Energy module-level power electronics, optimizers, rapid-shutdown devices, communication gateways, and accessories. "B2C Customer" means a natural person purchasing products for personal, non-commercial use. "B2B Customer" means a legal entity, sole proprietor, or any person acting in the course of a trade, business, craft, or profession. "Order" means a binding offer to purchase placed through our website. "Contract" means the agreement formed upon our written confirmation of the order.
terms.pEligibility: By placing an order you represent and warrant that: (a) you are at least 18 years of age or the age of legal majority in your jurisdiction; (b) you have the legal capacity and authority to enter into a binding contract; (c) if ordering on behalf of a business entity, you have the authority to bind that entity to these Terms; (d) all information you provide is accurate, current, and complete. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order if we have reasonable grounds to believe any of these conditions are not met.
terms.pOrders: An order placed through our website constitutes a binding offer by the Buyer to purchase the selected products. The contract between the Seller and the Buyer is formed only upon our dispatch of a written order confirmation (by email). We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to decline or cancel any order, in whole or in part, for any reason, including but not limited to: product unavailability, pricing errors, suspected fraud, violation of these Terms, or failure to verify Buyer identity or payment. An order confirmation does not constitute a guarantee of availability. If we are unable to fulfil an order after confirmation, we will notify you and issue a full refund for any amounts already paid.
terms.pPricing: All prices displayed on our website are in euros (EUR) unless otherwise explicitly stated. Prices for B2C customers include applicable value-added tax (VAT) at the rate required by the destination country under the EU One Stop Shop (OSS) scheme or the applicable local rate. Prices for B2B customers are displayed excluding VAT; applicable VAT will be calculated at checkout based on the delivery country and your VAT registration status. Valid EU VAT numbers provided at checkout may qualify for a reverse-charge (0% VAT) transaction. We reserve the right to change prices at any time without notice, but price changes will not affect orders already confirmed. In the event of a manifest pricing error (e.g., a product listed at €0.01 instead of its actual price), we reserve the right to cancel the order and refund any payment received.
terms.pPayment: Payment must be received in full before dispatch of goods unless a written credit agreement has been established. We accept payment by bank transfer and such other methods as may be displayed at checkout. For bank transfers, payment must be received within 5 business days of order confirmation; failure to pay within this period entitles us to cancel the order without further notice. For B2B customers with an approved credit account, payment terms are as specified in the individual credit agreement; in the absence of such agreement, payment is due immediately upon invoice. Late payments shall incur statutory interest at the rate prescribed by Slovenian law (currently 8% above the ECB reference rate for commercial transactions). We reserve the right to withhold delivery until all outstanding amounts, including any overdue invoices from prior transactions, are settled in full.
terms.pShipping: We ship to all countries where we operate regional storefronts. Shipping costs, estimated delivery times, and available carriers are displayed at checkout and may vary by destination, weight, and chosen service level. Delivery times are estimates only and are not guaranteed. We shall not be liable for any loss, damage, or cost arising from delayed delivery, including but not limited to consequential losses, lost profits, or project delays. Where a delivery is attempted and unsuccessful due to the Buyer's absence, incorrect address, or refusal to accept, any additional delivery charges incurred shall be borne by the Buyer. If the parcel is returned to us as undeliverable, we may deduct the cost of return shipping and any re-delivery charges from the refund.
terms.pRisk: For B2C customers, the risk of loss or damage to the products passes to the Buyer upon physical delivery to the Buyer or a person designated by the Buyer (excluding the carrier). For B2B customers, the risk of loss or damage passes to the Buyer at the moment the products are handed over to the first carrier for dispatch ("ex works" principle). Title to the products shall remain with the Seller until full payment has been received. In the event of late or non-payment, the Seller reserves the right to reclaim the products at the Buyer's expense.
terms.pInspection: The Buyer must inspect all goods immediately upon receipt. Any visible damage, shortages, or discrepancies must be reported to us at support@tigoenergy.shop within 24 hours of delivery. The delivery timestamp recorded by the carrier (e.g., DPD scan or delivery notification) constitutes the start of this 24-hour window. For parcels delivered by DPD or other tracked carriers, you must also note any external damage on the carrier's proof-of-delivery or electronic device at the time of receipt. Claims for visible damage or shortage submitted after the 24-hour period, or without notation on the carrier's records, may be rejected at our sole discretion. Photographs of the damaged items and packaging are required for all damage claims.
terms.pWithdrawal: In accordance with EU Directive 2011/83/EU and Slovenian Consumer Protection Act (ZVPot-1), B2C customers have the right to withdraw from the contract within 14 calendar days from the date on which the Buyer or a third party designated by the Buyer (other than the carrier) acquires physical possession of the goods, without giving any reason. To exercise this right, you must inform us of your decision by a clear statement sent to support@tigoenergy.shop before the 14-day period expires. You may use the return request form available in your order history on our website. Upon exercising the right of withdrawal, you must return the goods to us without undue delay and in any event no later than 14 days from the date of the withdrawal notice. The goods must be returned in their original, unopened, and undamaged packaging, complete with all accessories, manuals, and documentation. You bear the direct cost of returning the goods. We will refund all payments received from you, including the original delivery costs (except supplementary costs arising from your choice of a delivery method other than the least expensive standard delivery offered), within 14 days of receiving the returned goods or proof of dispatch, whichever is earlier. We may withhold the refund until we have received the goods back and verified their condition.
terms.pReturns: All returns are subject to inspection upon receipt at our warehouse. Products must be returned in their original, unopened, and undamaged condition, including all original packaging, labels, seals, accessories, and documentation. Products that have been opened, installed, used, modified, or damaged by the Buyer will not be accepted for return or will be subject to a deduction reflecting the diminished value, at our sole discretion. A minimum restocking fee of 25% of the product value applies to all returns received within 7 days of the return request. Returns received after 7 days but within the 14-day withdrawal period are subject to a restocking fee of up to 50%. Returns shipped without prior authorization (no RMA number) will be refused. Refunds will be processed using the same payment method used for the original purchase within 14 days of our receipt and inspection of the returned goods. For full return procedures and to initiate a return, please visit the Returns & Warranty page on our website.
terms.pB2B: All sales to B2B customers are final. Business customers expressly waive the right of withdrawal provided to consumers under EU Directive 2011/83/EU and any implementing national legislation. Returns from B2B customers are accepted solely at the discretion of Initra Energija d.o.o. and only with prior written authorization. If you submit a return request as a B2B customer and do not receive a response from us within 48 hours, your request is deemed rejected. Where a return is exceptionally authorized, restocking fees of at least 25% apply, and the Buyer bears all return shipping costs. B2B customers are responsible for verifying product suitability, compatibility, and compliance with local regulations before placing an order. The Seller shall not be liable for any losses, damages, or costs arising from the Buyer's failure to verify product suitability. B2B pricing, payment terms, and conditions may differ from those offered to B2C customers. Any individually negotiated terms shall take precedence over these general Terms to the extent they conflict.
terms.pWarranty: Tigo Energy products carry manufacturer warranties as specified by Tigo Energy, Inc. (up to 25 years for MLPE components, subject to Tigo's current warranty terms). The Seller (Initra Energija d.o.o.) acts solely as a distributor and does not manufacture any of the products sold. Accordingly, the Seller makes no warranties, express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. All warranty claims are processed through and subject to the manufacturer's warranty policy. We will assist customers in facilitating warranty claims with the manufacturer where reasonably possible, but we do not guarantee the outcome of any claim. The Seller's sole obligation under this section is to pass warranty claims to the manufacturer and relay responses to the customer.
terms.pLiability: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law: (a) The Seller's total aggregate liability arising out of or in connection with any order, contract, or these Terms shall not exceed the total amount paid by the Buyer for the specific order giving rise to the claim. (b) The Seller shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, loss of revenue, loss of data, loss of business opportunities, business interruption, cost of substitute goods or services, project delays, installation delays, system downtime, or any claims by third parties, even if the Seller has been advised of the possibility of such damages. (c) The Seller shall not be liable for any loss or damage caused by: the Buyer's failure to inspect goods upon receipt; improper installation, use, storage, or maintenance of products; use of products in a manner inconsistent with product documentation or applicable regulations; modifications or alterations made by the Buyer or third parties; normal wear and tear; or any event of force majeure. (d) Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability that cannot be excluded or limited under applicable mandatory law, including liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or fraudulent misrepresentation.
terms.pIP: All content on our websites — including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, product descriptions, software, and the overall design and layout — is the property of Initra Energija d.o.o. or its licensors and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. "Tigo", "Tigo Energy", the Tigo logo, and all Tigo product names are registered trademarks of Tigo Energy, Inc. and are used by us under authorization. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works from, publicly display, or otherwise use any content from our websites without our prior written consent. Any unauthorized use may violate copyright, trademark, and other laws and could give rise to civil and criminal liability.
terms.pAccuracy: We make every effort to ensure that product descriptions, specifications, images, and prices on our website are accurate and up to date. However, we do not warrant that product descriptions or other content is complete, accurate, reliable, current, or error-free. Product images are for illustrative purposes only and may differ from the actual product in colour, size, or appearance. Where a product is described as including specific technical specifications, such specifications are provided by the manufacturer and the Seller does not independently verify them. If a product you receive does not match its description in a material respect, your sole remedy is to return it in accordance with the applicable return procedure set out in these Terms.
terms.pProhibited: You agree not to: (a) use our website or services for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable local, national, or international law or regulation; (b) place fraudulent orders, use stolen payment credentials, or provide false identity or address information; (c) resell products purchased from us in a manner that infringes the Tigo Energy authorized distribution network or undermines authorized pricing structures without our prior written consent; (d) attempt to circumvent, disable, or interfere with any security features of our website; (e) use automated scripts, bots, or data-mining tools to access, scrape, or monitor our website; (f) impersonate any person or entity or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access and cancel any pending orders if we reasonably believe you have engaged in any prohibited activity.
terms.pPrivacy: We process personal data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Slovenian data protection legislation. For full details on what personal data we collect, how we use it, the legal basis for processing, your rights as a data subject, and how to exercise those rights, please refer to our Privacy Policy available at the "Privacy Policy" link in the footer of our website. By placing an order, you acknowledge that processing of your personal data is necessary for the performance of the contract.
terms.pForce: The Seller shall not be liable for any failure or delay in performing its obligations under these Terms to the extent that such failure or delay is caused by circumstances beyond the Seller's reasonable control, including but not limited to: natural disasters, epidemics, pandemics, war, terrorism, civil unrest, government sanctions or embargoes, import or export restrictions, strikes, labor disputes, power outages, internet or telecommunications failures, fire, flood, earthquake, or disruptions to supply chains or logistics networks. In the event of force majeure, the affected obligation shall be suspended for the duration of the event. If the force majeure event continues for more than 60 days, either party may terminate the affected order upon written notice.
terms.pGoverning: These Terms and any contract formed under them shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Slovenia, without regard to its conflict-of-law principles. The application of the United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods (CISG) is expressly excluded. For B2C customers residing in the EU, nothing in this clause affects your rights under the mandatory consumer protection provisions of your country of residence where those provisions provide a higher level of protection.
terms.pDispute: Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these Terms or any order placed shall first be attempted to be resolved amicably through direct negotiation. If no resolution is reached within 30 days, the dispute shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts in Ljubljana, Slovenia. For B2C customers residing in the EU: you may also use the European Commission's Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) platform available at https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. We are not obliged to participate in alternative dispute resolution procedures before a consumer arbitration board, but we will consider participation on a case-by-case basis.
terms.pSeverability: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect. The invalid or unenforceable provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it valid and enforceable while preserving the original intent of the parties, or if modification is not possible, it shall be severed from these Terms.
terms.pAmendments: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. The updated Terms will be published on our website with a revised "last updated" date. Changes will not apply retroactively to orders already confirmed before the date of the amendment. Your continued use of our website and placement of orders after the publication of amended Terms constitutes your acceptance of the amended Terms. We recommend reviewing these Terms periodically.
terms.pEntire: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, and Returns & Warranty Policy, constitute the entire agreement between the Buyer and the Seller with respect to the subject matter hereof. They supersede all prior or contemporaneous communications, proposals, and representations, whether oral or written, relating to the purchase of products through our website. No waiver of any provision of these Terms shall be effective unless in writing and signed by the Seller.
terms.pContact: For any questions regarding these Terms, please contact us at: Initra Energija d.o.o., Podsmreka 59A, 1356 Dobrova, Slovenia. Email: support@tigoenergy.shop. VAT ID: SI62518313. Registration No: 9624007000.

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.pAuthorized1: Initra Energija d.o.o. е оторизиран дистрибутор на продукти на Tigo Energy в Европа. Специализираме се изключително в решения на Tigo Energy, гарантирайки експертни познания и автентични продукти.
impressum.pResponsible: Initra Energija d.o.o. носи отговорност за цялото съдържание, публикувано на този уебсайт.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Initra Energija d.o.o. ("we", "us") uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our websites (tigoenergy.shop and all regional tigoenergy.* domains). This policy should be read together with our Privacy Policy.
cookies.pWhat: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently, provide a better user experience, and supply information to website operators. Cookies may be "session cookies" (deleted when you close your browser) or "persistent cookies" (remaining on your device for a set period or until you delete them). Cookies may be set by the website you are visiting ("first-party cookies") or by third parties whose content or services are embedded in the website ("third-party cookies").
cookies.pTypes: We categorize the cookies used on our website into the following groups: essential cookies (strictly necessary for the website to function), analytics cookies (help us understand how visitors use our website), and marketing cookies (used to track visitors across websites to display relevant advertisements). Each category is described in detail below.
cookies.pEssential: These cookies are required for the basic functionality of our website and cannot be disabled. They enable core features such as: maintaining your session while you browse (session cookie); remembering items in your shopping cart; processing secure checkout and payment; storing your cookie consent preferences; ensuring website security and preventing fraud. Legal basis: these cookies are strictly necessary for the provision of the service you have requested and do not require your consent under the ePrivacy Directive (Directive 2002/58/EC).
cookies.pAnalytics: We may use analytics cookies to collect anonymized, aggregated information about how visitors interact with our website, including: which pages are visited most frequently; how long visitors spend on each page; which links are clicked; error messages encountered; the device, browser, and operating system used. This data helps us improve the performance and usability of our website. Analytics cookies are only placed with your explicit consent. Legal basis: consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR). You may withdraw consent at any time through the cookie settings on our website.
cookies.pMarketing: Marketing cookies may be used to track your browsing activity across websites in order to deliver advertisements that are relevant to your interests. We currently do not use marketing or advertising cookies. Should this change in the future, this policy will be updated and your consent will be requested before any marketing cookies are placed.
cookies.pThirdParty: Some cookies on our website may be set by third-party services embedded in our pages, such as payment processors, analytics providers, or embedded content. These third parties may use cookies to collect information about your online activities over time and across different websites. We do not control these third-party cookies. Please refer to the respective third parties' privacy policies for more information about their cookie practices.
cookies.pControl: You can manage your cookie preferences in the following ways: (a) Cookie consent banner: when you first visit our website, a cookie consent banner allows you to accept or reject non-essential cookies. You can change your preferences at any time through the cookie settings link in the footer of our website. (b) Browser settings: most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can set your browser to refuse all cookies, accept only first-party cookies, or delete cookies when you close the browser. The method varies by browser — consult your browser's help documentation. (c) Opt-out links: for specific third-party analytics services, you may use their opt-out tools directly.
cookies.pImpact: Disabling essential cookies may prevent you from using key features of our website, including the shopping cart, checkout process, and account management. Disabling analytics cookies will not affect your ability to use the website but will prevent us from improving our services based on usage data.
cookies.pChanges: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. The updated policy will be published on our website with a revised "last updated" date. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.
cookies.pContact: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at: Initra Energija d.o.o., Podsmreka 59A, 1356 Dobrova, Slovenia. Email: support@tigoenergy.shop.

messages.dobNote: Вашата дата на раждане е необходима, за да потвърдим, че отговаряте на изискването за минимална възраст (18+) за тази услуга.
messages.addressNote: Моля, потвърдете адреса си с Google, като кликнете в прозореца за адрес и след това върху предложен от Google адрес.

messages.vatFormat: Формат: CC12345678 (напр. BG123456789). Кодът на държавата е задължителен.
messages.vatFallback: * Проверката става в реално време. Ако VIES е офлайн, ще пре преминем към ръчна проверка.
messages.nonEuNote: Въведете данъчния идентификационен номер на вашата компания за ръчна проверка.
messages.euNote: Въведете вашия валиден ДДС номер в ЕС, за да потвърдите бизнес статуса си чрез VIES.

messages.viesLocked: Този адрес е заключен — трябва да съответства на вашата VIES регистрация и ще се появи на всички официални фактури.
messages.addShipping: Добавете отделен адрес за доставка (по желание)
messages.addBilling: Добавете отделен адрес за фактуриране (по избор). Всички фактури се изпращат по имейл така или иначе.

agreements.terms: Съгласявам се с <terms>Условията за ползване</terms> и <aup>Политиката за приемливо ползване</aup>.
agreements.privacy: Потвърждавам, че се запознах с <privacy>Политиката за поверителност</privacy> и разбирам как се обработват данните ми.
agreements.newsletter: Абонирайте се за нашия бюлетин за последните новини и актуализации.
agreements.marketing: Съгласявам се да получавам промоционални предложения и специални отстъпки.
agreements.authorized: Потвърждавам, че съм оторизиран от компанията да се регистрирам от нейно име.
agreements.legitimate: Фирмата е правно активна и не е в производство по несъстоятелност или подобно.

errors.vatValidationFailed: ДДС номерът не е валиден. Моля проверете и опитайте отново.
errors.connectionError: Грешка при свързване. Моля опитайте отново.
errors.registrationFailed: Регистрацията не успя. Моля опитайте отново.
errors.verificationFailed: Проверката не успя. Моля опитайте отново.

forgotPassword.title: Забравена парола?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Въведете вашия имейл и ще ви изпратим връзка за нулиране на паролата.
forgotPassword.success: Ако съществува акаунт за този имейл, скоро ще получите връзка за нулиране на паролата.

resetPassword.title: Задайте нова парола
resetPassword.subtitle: Въведете сигурна нова парола за вашия акаунт.
resetPassword.noToken: Не е намерен токен за нулиране. Моля, използвайте връзката от вашия имейл.
resetPassword.expireNote: Връзките за нулиране изтичат след 1 час или могат да се използват само веднъж. Моля, поискайте нова връзка.

welcomePage.message: Вашият имейл е потвърден и акаунтът ви вече е активен. Вече можете да пазарувате продукти Tigo на <highlight>най-добрите цени в Европа</highlight>.

cookieConsent.title: Използваме бисквитки
cookieConsent.description: Използваме основни бисквитки за работата на магазина. С вашето съгласие може да използваме и аналитични и маркетингови бисквитки. Прочетете нашата
cookieConsent.essentialDesc: Необходими за работата на магазина: сесия, количка, езикови предпочитания. Не могат да бъдат деактивирани.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Помагат ни да разберем как посетителите използват сайта, за да го подобрим.
cookieConsent.marketingDesc: Позволяват ни да показваме подходящи реклами и да измерваме ефективността на кампаниите.

gdpr.title: Вашите права върху данните (GDPR)
gdpr.description: Съгласно GDPR имате право да получите достъп, да експортирате и да изтриете личните си данни по всяко време.

orderSuccess.title: Поръчката е потвърдена!
orderSuccess.subtitle: Благодарим ви за покупката. Вашата поръчка е направена успешно.
orderSuccess.shippingNotice: Ще ви уведомим, когато поръчката ви бъде изпратена.

orderDetail.orderNotFound: Не успяхме да намерим тази поръчка.
orderDetail.paymentRequiredDesc: Преведете точната сума, като използвате данните по-долу.
orderDetail.paymentReferenceNote: Винаги посочвайте тази референция, за да можем да идентифицираме вашето плащане.
orderDetail.statusConfirmedDesc: Вашата поръчка е потвърдена от нашия екип и се подготвя за изпращане.
orderDetail.statusPendingDesc: Очаква се потвърждение на поръчката. Нашият екип ще прегледа поръчката ви скоро.
orderDetail.statusUpdate: Текуща актуализация: Статусът на поръчката е {status}.
orderDetail.invoiceNotReady: Фактурата ще бъде налична за изтегляне след доставката на поръчката.
orderDetail.confirmCancel: Сигурни ли сте, че искате да отмените тази поръчка? Това действие не може да бъде отменено.
orderDetail.confirmModify: Вашата поръчка ще бъде превърната обратно в кошница, за да можете да добавяте или премахвате артикули, да променяте доставката и др. Продължаване?
orderDetail.cancelFailed: Неуспешна отмяна на поръчката. Моля, свържете се с поддръжката.
orderDetail.modifyFailed: Неуспешна промяна на поръчката. Моля, опитайте отново.
orderDetail.returnsNote: Връщането е за сметка на клиента • Първоначалната доставка не се възстановява
orderDetail.wiseSupports: Поддържа карта, ApplePay и банков превод Wise BE.
orderDetail.needProductSupport: Нуждаете се от поддръжка за продукта?
orderDetail.notifyTigoDesc: Уведомете Tigo Energy директно за вашия проблем
orderDetail.siteIdDesc: ID на сайта на вашата система за мониторинг Tigo
orderDetail.tigoNotified: Tigo Energy е уведомен. Ще се свържем с вас скоро.
orderDetail.paymentTermsNet30: Плащане в срок от {days} дни от датата на фактурата.
